title: Triple Baka Copper Golem (Javaficated)
description: javaficated resourcepack of tripleBaka copper golems!
body:
# Triple Baka Copper Golem Resource Pack

A lightweight Minecraft resource pack that **triples the number of copper golems** in your world.

## Overview

This is a **Java Edition conversion** of the original *Bedrock Edition* resource pack created by **TheBot03**.  
The pack replaces the standard copper golem model and textures, adding visual variety by introducing two additional unique copper golem variants alongside the original.

## Features

- Seamlessly replaces vanilla copper golem assets.
- Lightweight – does not affect game performance.
- Faithful to the original Bedrock edition concept by TheBot03.

## Credits

- **Original Bedrock Pack**: [TheBot03](https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/thebot03/projects)
- **Java Edition Port**: Current maintainer/porter

## Notes

This pack is a fan-made conversion intended for personal use.  
All original textures and concepts belong to their respective creators.
